Quick check before you buy any AI tool:

Pull your team's calendar from last week.
— Which 30-min recurring meetings could be a dashboard email?
— Which weekly reports could be a scheduled script?

Start there before you open ChatGPT. The boring automations win.

An HVAC contractor was quoting 8-12 jobs a week. Average response time: 31 hours. They were losing deals to competitors who answered faster.

We built a simple agent that reads incoming leads from their form, pulls similar past jobs from their CRM, drafts a quote in their pricing

Most AI pilots at mid-market manufacturers fail for the same reason: nobody owns the data.

IT owns the servers. Ops owns the process. Finance owns the ERP. But no one owns the question "is this field trustworthy enough to train on?"

Before you buy an AI tool, pick a data owner
